title:
MO MONEY
MO PROBLEMS
subtitle: Money solves problems… until it invents new ones.
sweetSpotMessage: Congratulations. You made it to The Sweet Spot. Your wealth level has gifted you stress relief, answered most of life’s financial worries, and given you and your children stability. You are now free to use your disposable time and income to do what you truly love.
musicEmbedHtml: <iframe height="152" src="https://open.spotify.com/embed/track/4INDiWSKvqSKDEu7mh8HFz?utm_source=generator" allow="autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" loading="lazy"></iframe>

tiers.name: Survival Mode
tiers.caption: Money is not abstract here. It is rent, food, transport, and breathing room.
questions: Can I make it to next month?
Is there anything left after food?

tiers.name: Bills Covered
tiers.caption: The emergency siren is quieter, but still plugged in.
questions: Is this stability or just a good month?
Can I say yes to dinner?

tiers.name: Stable Ground
tiers.caption: Life stops feeling like a trap door every morning.
questions: Can I take a small trip?
Should I finally fix that thing?

tiers.name: Comfortable
tiers.caption: A little oxygen enters the room.
questions: What is the sensible next step?

tiers.name: Secure
tiers.caption: The future starts looking less like a threat.

tiers.name: The Sweet Spot
tiers.caption: Comfortable home, passive income, future secured for children, freedom of time.

tiers.name: Extra Comfortable
tiers.caption: The answers are still useful, but new questions have entered the chat.
questions: Do I need to rebalance investments?
Why am I checking markets daily?

tiers.name: Asset Weather
tiers.caption: The portfolio has moods now.
questions: Is this enough for three generations?
Why does my peer have more?

tiers.name: Admin Dynasty
tiers.caption: You escaped scarcity and entered scheduling.
questions: Did I optimize the structure correctly?
Why do I have six calendars?
Who manages the person who manages this?

tiers.name: Endless Tabs Open
tiers.caption: Wealth unlocked: endless tabs open.
questions: Should the yacht have a gym?
Which tax jurisdiction matches my mood?
Do I need a retreat to recover from the retreat?
Why does the second chef need a consultant?

tiers.name: Fully Detached From the Human Experience
tiers.caption: The curve has become a mirror and nobody likes that.
questions: Should I buy privacy or silence?
Why does everyone want a meeting?
